*Use Claude Code 100 times cheaper with DeepSeek V4*

So, I'm showing you exactly how to combine Claude Code with the brand new DeepSeek V4 to save thousands of dollars and build with no rate limitations. What's really cool is this new repo sets everything up in minutes, even if you're a complete beginner.

*** CORE Software ***
🚀 AntiGravity: https://antigravity.google/
📁 GitHub: https://github.com/
💬 ChatGPT: https://chatgpt.com/
☁️ Claude: https://claude.ai/

⌚️ Stamps:
00:00 Intro
01:30 DeepSeek V4 
03:15 Dual terminal
06:45 Claude Tool calling
09:20 Design strategy
12:30 New Website
15:40 Important to Know

*** What Next? ***
Now grab that repo from the video and start building with DeepSeek for a fraction of the cost. And if you want the full Claude Code masterclass with all the power features and monetisation strategies, check out the community link above.
